    M

    Mage - Class in logic.entity.characters.rangedCharacters
    Mage ranged character that throws tarot-card projectiles with random effects.
    Mage() - Constructor for class logic.entity.characters.rangedCharacters.Mage
    Creates Mage with tuned stats and staff sprite.
    MAGICIAN - Enum constant in enum class logic.gameLogic.TarotType
    Balanced offensive card with moderate damage boost.
    main(String[]) - Static method in class application.Main
    Program entry point.
    Main - Class in application
    JavaFX application entry point for CroissantFighter.
    Main() - Constructor for class application.Main
     
    MATCH_DURATION_NANOS - Static variable in class component.scene2.Scene2
    Match duration converted to nanoseconds for AnimationTimer timestamps.
    MATCH_DURATION_SECONDS - Static variable in class component.scene2.Scene2
    Match duration in seconds.
    matchStartNanos - Variable in class component.scene2.Scene2
    Timestamp of first frame, used to calculate elapsed match time.
    MAX_AMMO - Variable in class logic.entity.characters.hybridCharacters.Exorcist
    Maximum bullet count per magazine.
    MAX_AMMO - Static variable in class logic.entity.characters.rangedCharacters.Bubble
    Maximum randomized ammo size after reload.
    MAX_FALL_SPEED - Variable in class logic.gameLogic.PlayerLogic
    Maximum downward fall speed clamp.
    MAX_SPEED - Variable in class logic.gameLogic.PlayerLogic
    Maximum horizontal speed clamp.
    maxAmmo - Variable in class logic.entity.characterClass.RangedClass
    Maximum ammo capacity.
    maxHp - Variable in class component.scene2.HealthBar
     
    maxHp - Variable in class logic.entity.Character
    Maximum hit points.
    maxHp - Variable in class logic.entity.characters.hybridCharacters.Vampire
    Cached max HP value used by lifesteal clamp logic.
    MeleeClass - Class in logic.entity.characterClass
    Base class for melee characters.
    MeleeClass() - Constructor for class logic.entity.characterClass.MeleeClass
    Creates a melee character with default melee archetype stats.
    MeleeClass(int, int, int, int, float) - Constructor for class logic.entity.characterClass.MeleeClass
    Creates a melee character with custom stats.
    MIN_AMMO - Static variable in class logic.entity.characters.rangedCharacters.Bubble
    Minimum randomized ammo size after reload.
